commands.name: package
commands.description: Validates the compatibility of package assets

options.name: --runtime-graph
options.description: The path to the runtime graph to read from.

options.name: --run-api-compat
options.description: If true, performs api compatibility checks on the package assets.

options.name: --enable-strict-mode-for-compatible-tfms
options.description: Validates api compatibility in strict mode for contract and implementation assemblies for all compatible target frameworks.

options.name: --enable-strict-mode-for-compatible-frameworks-in-package
options.description: Validates api compatibility in strict mode for assemblies that are compatible based on their target framework.

options.name: --enable-strict-mode-for-baseline-validation
options.description: Validates api compatibility in strict mode for package baseline checks.

options.name: --baseline-package
options.description: The path to a baseline package to validate against the current package.

options.name: --package-assembly-references
options.description: Paths to assembly references or their underlying directories for a specific target framework in the package. Values must be separated by commas: ','.

options.name: --baseline-package-assembly-references
options.description: Paths to assembly references or their underlying directories for a specific target framework in the baseline package. Values must be separated by commas: ','.

options.name: --baseline-package-frameworks-to-ignore
options.description: Target frameworks to ignore from the baseline package. Supports the wildcard character '*' at the end of the string. Culture and casing is ignored. The framework string must match the folder name in the baseline package.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --generate-suppression-file
options.description: If true, generates a compatibility suppression file.

options.name: --preserve-unnecessary-suppressions
options.description: If true, preserves unnecessary suppressions when re-generating the suppression file.

options.name: --permit-unnecessary-suppressions
options.description: If true, permits unnecessary suppressions in the suppression file.

options.name: --suppression-file
options.description: The path to one or more suppression files to read from.

options.name: --suppression-output-file
options.description: The path to a suppression file to write to when --generate-suppression-file is true.

options.name: --noWarn
options.description: A NoWarn string that allows to disable specific rules.

options.name: --respect-internals
options.description: If true, includes both internal and public API.

options.name: --roslyn-assemblies-path
options.description: The path to the directory that contains the Microsoft.CodeAnalysis assemblies.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the log level verbosity. Allowed values are high, normal, and low. [default: Normal]

options.name: --enable-rule-attributes-must-match
options.description: If true, enables rule to check that attributes match.

options.name: --exclude-attributes-file
options.description: The path to one or more attribute exclusion files with types in DocId format.

options.name: --enable-rule-cannot-change-parameter-name
options.description: If true, enables rule to check that the parameter names between public methods do not change.

options.name: --generate-suppression-file
options.description: If true, generates a compatibility suppression file.

options.name: --preserve-unnecessary-suppressions
options.description: If true, preserves unnecessary suppressions when re-generating the suppression file.

options.name: --permit-unnecessary-suppressions
options.description: If true, permits unnecessary suppressions in the suppression file.

options.name: --suppression-file
options.description: The path to one or more suppression files to read from.

options.name: --suppression-output-file
options.description: The path to a suppression file to write to when --generate-suppression-file is true.

options.name: --noWarn
options.description: A NoWarn string that allows to disable specific rules.

options.name: --respect-internals
options.description: If true, includes both internal and public API.

options.name: --roslyn-assemblies-path
options.description: The path to the directory that contains the Microsoft.CodeAnalysis assemblies.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Controls the log level verbosity. Allowed values are high, normal, and low. [default: Normal]

options.name: --enable-rule-attributes-must-match
options.description: If true, enables rule to check that attributes match.

options.name: --exclude-attributes-file
options.description: The path to one or more attribute exclusion files with types in DocId format.

options.name: --enable-rule-cannot-change-parameter-name
options.description: If true, enables rule to check that the parameter names between public methods do not change.

options.name: --left-assembly
options.description: The path to one or more assemblies that serve as the left side to compare.

options.name: --right-assembly
options.description: The path to one or more assemblies that serve as the right side to compare.

options.name: --strict-mode
options.description: If true, performs api compatibility checks in strict mode

options.name: --left-assembly-references
options.description: Paths to assembly references or the underlying directories for a given left. Values must be separated by commas: ','.

options.name: --right-assembly-references
options.description: Paths to assembly references or the underlying directories for a given right. Values must be separated by commas: ','.

options.name: --create-work-item-per-assembly
options.description: If true, enqueues a work item per passed in left and right assembly.

options.name: --left-assemblies-transformation-pattern
options.description: A transformation pattern for the left side assemblies.

options.name: --right-assemblies-transformation-pattern
options.description: A transformation pattern for the right side assemblies.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information
